steps.title: Substitute the known y-value
steps.content:
Since $y = 35$ from the second equation, substitute it into the first equation:
$$35 = 10x - 15$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content: Add 15 to both sides: $$50 = 10x$$ Divide by 10: $$x = 5$$ The solution is $(5, 35)$, which is choice A — A is correct.
